sentences.target: Ich stelle den Teller auf den Tisch.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə den ˈtɛlɐ aʊ̯f den tɪʃ/

translations.de: Ich stelle den Teller auf den Tisch.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə den ˈtɛlɐ aʊ̯f den tɪʃ/
translations.en: I'm putting the plate on the table.
translations.es: Estoy poniendo el plato sobre la mesa.
translations.fr: Je pose l'assiette sur la table.
translations.ko: 접시를 식탁 위에 올려 놓고 있어요.
translations.yue: 我而家將個碟放喺枱上。
translations.pt: Estou colocando o prato na mesa.
translations.he: אני שם את הצלחת על השולחן.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt cái đĩa lên bàn.
translations.nl: Ik zet het bord op tafel.
translations.hi: मैं प्लेट मेज़ पर रख रहा हूँ।
translations.ja: 皿をテーブルの上に置いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes placing something.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Teller'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in the accusative singular.
Preposition; governs accusative here to indicate motion onto a surface, introducing the PP.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Tisch' within the PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' (accusative due to direction).

sentences.target: Du hältst den Teller sehr schief.

translations.de: Du hältst den Teller sehr schief.
translations.en: You're holding the plate very crooked.
translations.es: Estás sosteniendo el plato muy inclinado.
translations.fr: Tu tiens l'assiette très de travers.
translations.it: Stai tenendo il piatto molto storto.
translations.pt: Você está segurando o prato bem torto.
translations.he: אתה מחזיק את הצלחת ממש עקום.
translations.vi: Bạn đang cầm cái đĩa nghiêng quá.
translations.ar: أنت تمسك الطبق بشكل مائل جدًا.
translations.nl: Je houdt het bord heel scheef.
translations.hi: तुम प्लेट बहुत तिरछी पकड़े हुए हो।
translations.ja: 皿をすごく斜めに持っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; denotes the action of holding.
Definite article, accusative singular masculine; determiner of 'Teller'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object in the accusative singular.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'schief'.
Adjective used predicatively as a complement/manner description to the verb; describes the orientation of the plate being held.

sentences.target: Der Teller ist noch in der Spülmaschine.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈtɛlɐ ɪst nɔx ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃpyːlmaʃiːnə/

translations.de: Der Teller ist noch in der Spülmaschine.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈtɛlɐ ɪst nɔx ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃpyːlmaʃiːnə/
translations.en: The plate is still in the dishwasher.
translations.es: El plato todavía está en el lavavajillas.
translations.fr: L'assiette est encore dans le lave-vaisselle.
translations.it: Il piatto è ancora nella lavastoviglie.
translations.ru: Тарелка всё ещё в посудомоечной машине.
translations.pt: O prato ainda está na lava-louças.
translations.vi: Cái đĩa vẫn còn trong máy rửa chén.
translations.ar: الطبق ما زال في غسالة الصحون.
translations.nl: Het bord zit nog in de vaatwasser.
translations.hu: A tányér még a mosogatógépben van.
translations.hi: प्लेट अभी भी डिशवॉशर में है।
translations.el: Το πιάτο είναι ακόμα στο πλυντήριο πιάτων.
translations.id: Piringnya masih di mesin cuci piring.
translations.ro: Farfuria este încă în mașina de spălat vase.
translations.ja: 皿はまだ食器洗い機の中にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Teller'.
Common noun, masculine; subject in the nominative singular.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the following prepositional phrase.
Temporal adverb; indicates continuation at the reference time.
Preposition; governs dative here, introducing the PP 'in der Spülmaschine'.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Spülmaschine'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' in the dative singular.

sentences.target: Wir haben nur zwei Teller im Schrank.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən nuːɐ̯ t͡svaɪ̯ ˈtɛlɐ ɪm ʃʁaŋk/

translations.de: Wir haben nur zwei Teller im Schrank.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən nuːɐ̯ t͡svaɪ̯ ˈtɛlɐ ɪm ʃʁaŋk/
translations.en: We only have two plates in the cupboard.
translations.es: Solo tenemos dos platos en el armario.
translations.fr: On n'a que deux assiettes dans le placard.
translations.yue: 櫥櫃入面淨係得兩隻碟。
translations.ru: У нас в шкафу всего две тарелки.
translations.pt: No armário só temos dois pratos.
translations.he: יש לנו רק שתי צלחות בארון.
translations.vi: Trong tủ chỉ có hai cái đĩa.
translations.nl: In de kast hebben we maar twee borden.
translations.uk: У нас у шафі лише дві тарілки.
translations.hu: A szekrényben csak két tányérunk van.
translations.hi: अलमारी में हमारे पास सिर्फ दो प्लेटें हैं।
translations.pl: W szafce mamy tylko dwa talerze.
translations.el: Στο ντουλάπι έχουμε μόνο δύο πιάτα.
translations.nb: I skapet har vi bare to tallerkener.
translations.id: Di lemari cuma ada dua piring.
translations.sv: I skåpet har vi bara två tallrikar.
translations.ro: În dulap avem doar două farfurii.
translations.cs: Ve skříňce máme jen dva talíře.
translations.da: I skabet har vi kun to tallerkener.
translations.fi: Kaapissa meillä on vain kaksi lautasta.
translations.ja: 食器棚には皿が二枚しかない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; denotes possession.
Focus adverb; limits the quantity expressed by the numeral.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'Teller'.
Common noun; direct object in the accusative plural, counted by 'zwei'.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative, introducing the PP 'im Schrank'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im' in the dative singular.
